list.header.title: Registry
list.empty.title: No tenants yet.
list.empty.description: Provision the first tenant to get started.
detail.overview.title: Overview
detail.actions.impersonateHint: Sign in as a user inside this tenant
detail.actions.renewHint: Extend validity by one plan term, or switch plans
detail.actions.adjustHint: Set the expiry date directly with no invoice (operator override)
detail.confirm.deactivateBody: Users of {{name}} will be blocked from signing in and all their API requests will be rejected until you reactivate the tenant.
detail.confirm.activateBody: {{name}}'s users will be able to sign in and use the platform again.
detail.details.title: Details
detail.details.description: The tenant's identity, contact, and subscription window. Identifiers are immutable; the issuer scopes JWTs to this tenant.
detail.row.name: Name
detail.provisioning.title: Provisioning
detail.provisioning.description: Live status of the background pipeline that seeds the tenant database, default roles, and admin user. Polls every 2 seconds while running.
detail.provisioning.notTrackedBody: This tenant wasn't created through the provisioning pipeline, so there's no run history to show. Tenants created via the console report their seed/migrate steps here.
adjust.title: Adjust validity
adjust.description: Set this tenant's expiry date directly — an operator override with no invoice. Use for comps or corrections; renewals that should bill belong in Renew. Currently valid until {{date}}.
adjust.field.hint: Backdating is allowed. No invoice is issued for an adjustment.
adjust.toast.title: Validity adjusted
adjust.toast.description: Valid until {{date}}. No invoice was issued.
create.validation.id: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens. 3–64 chars. No leading/trailing hyphen.
create.title: New tenant
create.description: Provision a tenant and its seed admin. The identifier is the URL-safe slug used in routing and JWT claims.
create.field.name: Display name
create.field.identifierValid: Valid format — availability is confirmed when you create.
create.field.identifierHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. 3–64 characters.
create.field.passwordHint: The first admin signs in with this and can rotate it after first login.
create.field.planHint: Sets the first invoice and how long the tenant stays valid. Defaults to the trial plan.
create.field.planHintError: Could not load plans — the tenant will fall back to the default plan.
create.advanced.title: Advanced
create.advanced.subtitle: issuer, dedicated database
create.field.issuerHint: Mirrors the identifier by default. Issued in tokens to scope sessions.
create.field.connectionStringHint: Optional. Leave blank to use the shared catalog database.
create.toast.createdDescription: Provisioning runs in the background. Track progress on the detail page.
create.preview.provisioningNote: Provisioning runs in the background. You can track progress on the tenant's detail page.
renew.title: Renew subscription
renew.description: Extend the tenant by one plan term (stacking on remaining time) or switch plans. Currently valid until {{date}}.
renew.field.hintSwitching: Switching plans — the new plan applies from this renewal forward.
renew.field.hintRenewing: Renewing the current plan extends validity by one term.
renew.toast.description: Valid until {{date}}. A term invoice was issued.
branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Theme tokens consumed by this tenant's apps on sign-in. Live preview reflects the primary action with the chosen palette.
branding.descriptionLoading: Operator-controlled colors + brand assets that drive this tenant's UI.
branding.assets.title: Brand assets
branding.assets.description: URLs to your hosted brand assets. Upload via the Files module first, then paste the resulting public URL here.
branding.preview.paragraph: A short paragraph rendered with the chosen body color over the chosen surface, on the chosen page background. Action buttons use the primary token.
